headline: The Consortium Fueling The Nuclear Renaissance
summary: DOE approved the Nuclear Fuel Cycle Consortium Voluntary Agreement. Major participants in the consortium include Solstice Advanced Materials, Mirion Technologies and Amentum. Read more here.
